# Drive247

> A branded booking site, admin system, and renter portal — built for US independent car rental operators who want more control than Turo.

Drive247 is a SaaS product by Cortek (UK) that helps independent car rental operators run their own direct booking platform — replacing dependency on marketplaces like Turo.

## Pages

- [Home](https://drive247.co): Landing page with product overview, features, onboarding timeline, and FAQ.
- [Privacy](https://drive247.co/privacy): Privacy policy — Cortek as processor, rental company as controller.
- [Terms](https://drive247.co/terms): Terms of service for the Drive247 platform.
- [Security](https://drive247.co/security): Security & compliance overview.

## Key features

- Branded booking website
- Operations admin dashboard
- Renter portal with messaging
- Stripe payment integration
- Document collection & e-sign
- Insurance workflow (Bonzah integration)
- ID verification (CheckMyDriver integration)
- Extensions & renewals
- Reporting & analytics
